summary: Full backend + frontend verification of the Beta Terms / Privacy / Disclaimer gate. 6/6 pytest cases pass, FE Playwright flow PASSES end-to-end (account-type → BetaTerms gate → 3 consent ticks → register → member-select), and the /terms route renders correctly in EN/AR/DE with 11/7/8 bullets and no raw key leaks.
critical_code_review_comments: WallBoard.jsx is 2395 lines — same modularization concern raised in iter-10 still applies. WallSettingsDialog (lines 1135-1300+) could move into its own file with the rest of the dialogs.

BetaTerms.jsx duplicates the /api/auth/app/info fetch logic across 3 mount points (Login.jsx, Terms.jsx, WallBoard.jsx WallSettingsDialog). Recommend extracting into a useAppInfo() hook in /app/frontend/src/lib so the version chip is consistent and cached app-wide.

The chip momentarily renders 'Beta · v' (empty version placeholder) before the async fetch resolves. Minor flash-of-incomplete-content; consider hiding the chip until appVersion is non-empty, OR seeding it at build time from package.json so no network round-trip is needed.

RegisterPayload accepts the three consents as separate booleans — fine for now, but if a 4th consent is ever added (e.g. marketing) consider grouping them into a `consents: {...}` nested object to keep the payload tidy.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (gate flow + EN/AR/DE on /terms, 11/7/8 bullets, no raw beta.* key leaks, register→member-select success)

test_credentials: Fresh families registered per run via /api/auth/register with qa-beta-fe-<ts>@example.com / Pass1234! (all three consents true). Pre-existing admin login bsn.1988@hotmail.com / 11qqQQ!! verified to still work without consents field (no migration break).
seed_data_creation: Each pytest + FE run creates a fresh family with TEST_-prefixed family name and unique timestamped email; no cleanup necessary.
context_for_next_testing_agent: test_beta_terms.py covers: GET /api/auth/app/info shape (name+version+stage=='0.9.0-beta'/'beta'), POST /api/auth/register with 0/1/2 consents -> 400 'Beta Terms' detail, POST with all 3 -> 200 + immediate login success (proves consents persisted and no re-prompt), pre-existing admin (no consents field) still logs in. FE coverage: account-type-screen -> pick-family -> login-go-register -> beta-terms-screen renders with chip 'Beta · v0.9.0-beta', beta-continue-btn disabled, ticking 1 keeps it disabled, ticking 3 enables, click forwards to register-screen, registration with consents lands on member-select-screen. /terms via direct nav renders read-only (no beta-consents-block, no beta-continue-btn). Lang switching done by writing localStorage.mfml_lang and reloading -- AR/DE both render correct 11/7/8 bullets, localized titles ('Beta-Hinweis' DE, 'شروط النسخة التجريبية' AR), and chip preserves 0.9.0-beta. Note: wall-beta-version + open-terms-btn inside WallSettingsDialog were NOT executed end-to-end (would need full member bootstrap + PIN flow); inspected source and confirmed the testids exist at WallBoard.jsx:1260 and 1264 and use the same /api/auth/app/info endpoint that has been validated.
rca_of_the_issue: N/A — no defects found. Every spec bullet verified except the wall-beta-version chip which was only source-inspected (testids and fetch logic confirmed in code).
